title: Technician and Multimedia Designer at LINKS International
description: Development of CD-ROMs on architectural design, interior spaces, and European furniture for LINKS International.
body:
**LINKS International** was a company specializing in the production of high-quality digital publications focused on cultural and design fields. I worked as a **multimedia technician and designer** on a collection of CD-ROMs aimed at professionals in the creative industry.

## Design CD-ROM Collection

-   **Architectural Design** — An interactive exploration of contemporary architectural works and trends.
-   **Interior Spaces** — A visual and conceptual reference for interior design professionals.
-   **European Furniture** — An interactive catalog of the best European designer furniture.

## Design and Production

Each title required a careful balance between visual quality—high-resolution images, careful typography, intuitive navigation—and the technical limitations of the media of the time. Editorial design and technical production went hand in hand throughout the process.

## First Professional Multimedia Experience

This period was fundamental to my training: learning to combine design, programming, and interactive storytelling in a professional and demanding context laid the foundation for everything that would follow.

## Technologies

-   Macromedia Director
-   Lingo
-   Photoshop
-   Freehand
